meta.description: Declarative policies for SSA Reasoner shims (model type, token budgets, follow-up limits).

imports.normalizer.label: Import Normalizer
imports.normalizer.description: Low-latency helper that normalizes raw imports (recipes, cleaning plans, garden plans, etc.) into SSA canonical shapes.

sessions.planner.label: Session Planner
sessions.planner.description: Transforms normalized imports into multi-step Sessions with cues, blockers, and metadata.

sessions.guardExplainer.label: Guard Explainer
sessions.guardExplainer.description: Explains why a session is blocked (Sabbath, Quiet Hours, inventory, weather) in user-friendly language.

sessions.coach.label: Session Coach
sessions.coach.description: Optional in-session coach that gives tips, substitutions, and safety notes for the current step.

nutrition.analyzer.label: Nutrition Analyzer
nutrition.analyzer.description: Evaluates meals, recipes, and batch sessions for nutritional profile and macro alignment.

storehouse.optimizer.label: Storehouse Optimizer
storehouse.optimizer.description: Suggests replenishment plans, batch cooking strategies, and preservation sessions based on inventory and goals.

homestead.strategist.label: Homestead Strategist
homestead.strategist.description: Higher-budget planner that coordinates garden, animals, preservation, and storehouse sessions over days or weeks.

chat.assistant.label: User Chat Assistant
chat.assistant.description: General chat interface inside SSA (explanations, Q&A, walkthroughs).

debug.trace.label: Debug Trace Reasoner
debug.trace.description: Verbose reasoning used only in development for tracing pipelines. Never exposed to end users.
